name: David Pack
abstract: David Robert Pack (born July 15, 1952) is an American singer, songwriter, is best known as co-founder, lead vocalist and guitarist of the rock band Ambrosia in the 1970s and 1980s. Pack wrote and sang all of Ambrosia's RIAA certified gold hits including 3x Grammy nominee “Biggest Part of Me”, “How Much I Feel” and “You're the Only Woman …

concerts.label: Children Will Listen, A Special Benefit Concert for Kids with AIDS

about_quotes.speaker: Chazz Frichtel
about_quotes.evidence: David Pack from Ambrosia was the guitar player at the time... It was the first gig I did with him
